text: This verse is omitted by some manuscripts.
‘There is another’; some understand this of St John the Baptist, but it is more commonly interpreted as applying to the Father; cf. verse 37.

‘The vision of him’; if this is understood literally, it is hard to see how our Lord attaches any blame to the Jews for not seeing God (cf. 1.18 above); it is perhaps better to suppose that our Lord is reproaching them with a spiritual blindness towards all God’s manifestations of himself.
‘You pore over the scriptures’; the phrase was generally taken by the older commentators as a command, ‘pore over the scriptures’; but this seems less appropriate to the context.
